mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS reg_count FROM member WHERE TO_DATE(reg_date, 'YY/MM/DD') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND SYSDATE
SELECT COUNT(*) AS reg_count FROM member WHERE TO_DATE(reg_date, 'YY/MM/DD') BETWEEN TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'MM') AND LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1))
SELECT SUM(amount) FROM Transaction_log WHERE reg_date BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND SYSDATE
SELECT SUM(amount) FROM Transaction_log WHERE reg_date BETWEEN TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'MM') AND LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1))
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT mg.no) FROM member_group mg JOIN group_morak gm ON mg.group_no = gm.group_no WHERE mg.status IN ('member', 'leader') AND gm.last_date BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND SYSDATE

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT mg.no) FROM member_group mg JOIN group_morak gm ON mg.group_no = gm.group_no WHERE mg.status IN ('member', 'leader') AND gm.last_date BETWEEN TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'MM') AND LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1))
SELECT COUNT FROM visit_log WHERE visit_date BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND SYSDATE
SELECT COUNT FROM visit_log WHERE visit_date BETWEEN TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'MM') AND LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1))
